titleZh: 2026 年 AI 大模型全景对比：开源与闭源模型的多维度深度分析
titleEn: The 2026 AI Model Landscape: A Multi-Dimensional Deep Dive into Open-Source and Closed-Source Models
introZh: 全面梳理截至 2026 年 6 月的主流开源与闭源大模型，从发布时间、应用场景、成本、模态、合规性、数据安全等维度进行系统对比，为 AI 产品经理和技术决策者提供选型参考。
introEn: A comprehensive June 2026 survey of open-source and closed-source AI models, systematically compared across release dates, use cases, cost, modality, licensing compliance, and data security.
